name: NationBuilder
description: The leading political campaign management platform — combines CRM, website builder, email, social media, and voter database into one system designed specifically for political campaigns and advocacy organisations.
whyUseIt: NationBuilder is purpose-built for politics. It tracks every voter interaction, automates follow-ups, manages volunteers, and provides reporting that campaign managers need. Used by major parties and independents worldwide, including Australian campaigns.
aiCapabilities: AI-powered supporter scoring, automated email personalisation, predictive engagement analytics
funnelPosition: Full funnel — awareness through to election day operations
marketerWorkflow: Set up supporter profiles, segment by electorate and issue, run targeted email sequences, track volunteer shifts, process donations — all from one dashboard
managerExpects: Real-time dashboard showing: total supporters, volunteer hours this week, funds raised, doors knocked, and email open rates
aiWorkflowImpact: AI supporter scoring can prioritise which voters to contact first based on engagement likelihood, reducing wasted volunteer hours by up to 30%
demoDescription: Create a voter segment of 'persuadable voters in postcode 2000 who opened our last email but haven't donated', then set up an automated email sequence with a donation ask

vocabulary.definition: The journey from first contact to active volunteer or donor
A score representing a supporter's engagement level and influence

beginnerMistakes: Importing a purchased email list instead of building organic supporters
Not segmenting communications by electorate or issue interest
